content.query:
--DROP EXTERNAL TABLE SLS.CostcoCatalog

CREATE EXTERNAL TABLE SLS.CostcoCatalog (
[SKU] nvarchar(4000),
[Aligned Item Number] nvarchar(4000),
[M3 TLC Model] nvarchar(4000),
[Costco (US) ID] nvarchar(4000),
[Costco (US) Vendor #] nvarchar(4000),
[Costco (US) URL] nvarchar(4000),
[Costco (US) Unit Cost] nvarchar(4000)
)
WITH (
LOCATION = 'Salsify/CostcoCatalog_PowerBI.csv',
DATA_SOURCE = [tlclakefs_tlclake_dfs_core_windows_net],
FILE_FORMAT = [SynapseDelimitedTextFormatQuote]
)
GO


SELECT TOP 100 * FROM SLS.CostcoCatalog
GO
